meta.description: Registry of data sources for the US AI infrastructure facility pipeline
meta.quality_policy: Every record in facilities_master.json must have at least one source_url from a verifiable public source. Records from the hand-curated seed (existing_data_centers) are treated as tier-2 confidence and should be verified against tier-1 sources over time. Never invent or estimate facilities to reach an arbitrary count.

sources.name: Existing Hand-Curated Dataset (data_centers.json + ai_campuses.json)
sources.notes: Seed dataset from prior hand-curation. Treated as tier-2 confidence (0.85). Individual records lack source URLs. Higher-tier pipeline sources will enrich these records with verified URLs and updated metadata when they match spatially or by name. Do not add new records to data_centers.json — use the pipeline adapters instead.

sources.name: OpenStreetMap (Overpass API)
sources.notes: Queries building=data_center, building=datacenter, man_made=data_center tags within continental US bounding box. Community-maintained; coverage is good for large facilities, sparse for enterprise/edge. Run monthly.

sources.name: DataCenterMap.com
sources.notes: Public directory of colocation facilities. Polite crawl at 1 req/2s. Robots.txt permits crawling. Good coverage of colocation providers. Run quarterly.

sources.name: Equinix IBX Locations (Official Website)
sources.notes: Equinix's own published IBX data center location pages. Tier-1 source — operator's own information. Run monthly to catch new IBX openings. Requires requests + beautifulsoup4.

sources.name: Digital Realty Trust Locations (Official Website)
sources.notes: Digital Realty Trust's own published data center location pages. Tier-1 source. Run monthly. Requires requests + beautifulsoup4.

sources.name: FERC Interconnection Queue (Active Requests)
sources.notes: Federal Energy Regulatory Commission active interconnection request queue. Large power requests (>50 MW) may indicate planned data centers. All records are candidates — requires human review to verify that the project is a data center, not another industrial use. Run quarterly. Requires requests + openpyxl.

sources.name: SEC EDGAR Full-Text Search (8-K Filings)
sources.notes: SEC EDGAR full-text search for 8-K filings announcing data center facility acquisitions, leases, or construction. All results are candidates — the filing text rarely includes precise coordinates, so records need verification via mapping or operator website. Run monthly. EDGAR fair-use policy requires User-Agent with contact info.

sources.name: Cloudscene API
sources.notes: Paid API with the most comprehensive colocation coverage. Set CLOUDSCENE_API_KEY environment variable to activate. Highest-trust aggregator for colocation facilities. Run weekly when active.

sources.name: Hyperscale Operator Newsrooms (RSS)
sources.notes: Monitors RSS feeds from Microsoft, Meta, Google, and Amazon newsrooms for data center and AI campus announcements. All results are candidates (confidence 0.50) requiring human review. Run weekly to catch new announcements early.

planned_sources.name: QTS / Iron Mountain Data Centers Locations
planned_sources.notes: QTS was acquired by BlackStone in 2021 and rebranded under Iron Mountain Data Centers. Official location pages list all US campuses.

planned_sources.name: CoreSite Realty Locations (American Tower)
planned_sources.notes: CoreSite (American Tower subsidiary) official location pages. Strong West Coast and Chicago presence.

planned_sources.name: CyrusOne Locations (KKR / GIP)
planned_sources.notes: CyrusOne official location pages. Major presence in TX, OH, VA, AZ.

planned_sources.name: Switch PRIME Campus Locations (DigitalBridge)
planned_sources.notes: Switch SUPERNAP campuses: Las Vegas (NV), Grand Rapids (MI), Atlanta (GA), Reno (NV). Tier IV design.

planned_sources.name: Flexential Data Center Locations
planned_sources.notes: Flexential operates 40+ data centers across western/central US. Strong CO, OR, WA, TX presence.

planned_sources.name: Vantage Data Centers Locations
planned_sources.notes: Vantage operates hyperscale-adjacent campuses. Major presence in VA, AZ, CA, WA. Silver Lake-backed.

planned_sources.name: Cologix Network-Dense Data Centers
planned_sources.notes: Cologix operates 40+ carrier-neutral facilities across NA. Strong presence in Columbus OH, Toronto, Montreal, Denver, Jacksonville.

planned_sources.name: Expedient Data Centers
planned_sources.notes: Expedient operates 11 facilities in Pittsburgh PA, Cleveland OH, Columbus OH, Louisville KY, Indianapolis IN, Baltimore MD, Memphis TN.

planned_sources.name: PJM Interconnection Queue (Mid-Atlantic)
planned_sources.notes: PJM active interconnection queue. Covers VA, OH, IL, PA, MD, NJ, DE, DC, WV, KY, MI (in part). Large power requests (>50 MW) may signal planned data centers. Cross-reference by county against known DC corridors.

planned_sources.name: MISO Interconnection Queue (Midwest)
planned_sources.notes: MISO covers IA, MN, WI, IL, IN, MI, MO, ND, SD, MT (east), MN, LA, MS, AR. Cross-reference large industrial loads against known DC operators.

planned_sources.name: WECC / CAISO Interconnection Queue (West)
planned_sources.notes: CAISO and WECC interconnection queues cover CA, NV, AZ, WA, OR, ID, UT, CO, WY, MT (west). Cross-reference large loads against data center corridors.

planned_sources.name: EIA Form EIA-861 Large Power Consumers
planned_sources.notes: EIA annual electric power industry report. Large commercial consumers (>10 MW) can be cross-referenced against known DC operators.

planned_sources.name: Loudoun County VA — Building Permit Search
planned_sources.notes: Loudoun County VA ('Data Center Alley') building permits. Publicly searchable. Filter for large commercial/industrial applications.

planned_sources.name: NC Secretary of State — Corporation Filings
planned_sources.notes: NC SOS entity search returns registered addresses. Data center LLCs filing in NC (especially Chatham, Orange, Catawba counties) can indicate planned facilities.

planned_sources.name: EPA Air Quality Permits — Large Generator Sets
planned_sources.notes: EPA ECHO facility search. Data centers with large diesel generator sets file air quality permits. Filter by SIC 7374 and NAICS 518210. Provides address-level location data.

planned_sources.name: OpenAI / SoftBank Stargate Project Newsroom
planned_sources.notes: Stargate joint venture (OpenAI + SoftBank + Oracle + MGX) announcements. $500B AI infrastructure commitment. First campus: Abilene TX. Monitor OpenAI newsroom for additional campus announcements.

planned_sources.name: xAI (Elon Musk) Official Announcements
planned_sources.notes: xAI Colossus Memphis campus (100,000+ H100 GPUs) operational. Monitor for additional campus announcements (Colossus Phase 2, Memphis expansion).
